topic: Build-ready implementation of keystone DQ automations A1/B1/B2/B3/C2 — exact files, seams, timing, rollback, risks, rollout

focus: A1: extend quality machinery to authored spec-doc + metadata-JSON write surface
noveltyJustification: Two-machinery distinction (pure scorer vs destructive loop), exact exported-function seams, H1/H2/H3 hooks

ruledOut.approach: Extend runQualityLoop wholesale onto authored docs
ruledOut.reason: attemptAutoFix substring budget-trim destructive on 8KB+ docs

focus: B1: standing scheduled DQ sweep — scheduler, fixClass allow-list, corpus runner, idempotency
noveltyJustification: CI schedule PRIMARY + zero-install post-merge, deny-by-default fixClass allow-list, backfill idempotency reuse

ruledOut.reason: per-dev unenforced; needs team-wide CI schedule

focus: B2: /doctor auto-remediation — route on code-graph, inverted mutation_boundaries, DIAGNOSE/APPLY x fixClass
noveltyJustification: Route-on-code-graph, inverted validate_targets reuse, detector x intent matrix

ruledOut.reason: read-only by contract; add a new route

focus: B3: retrieval-learning feedback edge — impression capture, edge-a/edge-b floor split, report-only queue
noveltyJustification: Edge-a/edge-b floor split keyed on impression-vs-selection, new impression-capture seam (proven absent), queue on learned-feedback governance

focus: C2: prod-mode completeRecall@3 — run-eval-v2.mjs already IS the dual-mode harness; gap is spec golden + baseline gate
noveltyJustification: Decisive: prod-mode @3 dual-mode harness already exists; C2 reframed to author spec golden + port skill-bench regression gate

focus: Cross-cutting: one dq-engine + detector-registry, three front doors, 12-stage end-to-end rollout with per-stage rollback
noveltyJustification: Engine/registry/three-door architecture and interleaved 12-stage rollout sequencing all five keystones; composes iters 1-5

ruledOut.approach: Five separate fix engines per surface
ruledOut.reason: would diverge in classification; one engine + one registry

focus: Adversarial verification of load-bearing seams: 2 confirmed (truncation floor, non-mutating reviewer), 2 corrected (A1 reviewer seam is workflow.ts:1854 not generate-context; eval-v2 exit is error-catch not a gate so C2 gate is fully net-new)
noveltyJustification: No new design; two file:line corrections + two confirmations that sharpen the build map

ruledOut.approach: Treat run-eval-v2.mjs exit 1 as an existing regression gate
ruledOut.reason: it is the uncaught-error catch handler, not a recall verdict
